name: mcp-server-madeonsol
description: Solana KOL trading intelligence and deployer analytics. Real-time data from 1,000+ KOL wallets, 6,700+ Pump.fun deployers, 47,000+ scored alpha wallets, server-side copy-trade rules, and wallet tracker. Supports free MadeOnSol API key (msk_) or x402 micropayments.

tools.name: madeonsol_kol_feed
tools.description: Get real-time Solana KOL trades from 1,000+ tracked wallets.

tools.name: madeonsol_kol_coordination
tools.description: Get KOL convergence signals — tokens multiple KOLs are accumulating.

tools.name: madeonsol_kol_leaderboard
tools.description: Get KOL performance rankings by PnL and win rate.

tools.name: madeonsol_deployer_alerts
tools.description: Get Pump.fun deployer alerts with KOL enrichment.

tools.name: madeonsol_kol_pairs
tools.description: KOL affinity matrix — which KOLs co-trade the same tokens.

tools.name: madeonsol_kol_timing
tools.description: KOL entry/exit timing profile. Pro/Ultra.

tools.name: madeonsol_deployer_trajectory
tools.description: Deployer skill curve — streaks, trend. Pro/Ultra.

tools.name: madeonsol_kol_hot_tokens
tools.description: KOL momentum tokens — accelerating buy interest.

tools.name: madeonsol_kol_pnl
tools.description: Deep per-wallet PnL: equity curve, risk metrics, positions.

tools.name: madeonsol_kol_trending_tokens
tools.description: Tokens ranked by KOL buy volume (5m–12h windows).

tools.name: madeonsol_kol_token_entry_order
tools.description: Ranked KOL first-buyers for a specific token.

tools.name: madeonsol_kol_compare_wallets
tools.description: Side-by-side comparison of 2-5 KOL wallets (overlap in PRO+).

tools.name: madeonsol_kol_alerts_recent
tools.description: Unified live KOL alert feed: clusters, fresh buys, heating-up.

tools.name: madeonsol_discovery
tools.description: List all available endpoints with prices. Free, no auth required.

tools.name: madeonsol_create_webhook
tools.description: Register a webhook for real-time push notifications. Pro/Ultra.

tools.name: madeonsol_list_webhooks
tools.description: List your registered webhooks. Pro/Ultra.

tools.name: madeonsol_delete_webhook
tools.description: Delete a webhook by ID. Pro/Ultra.

tools.name: madeonsol_test_webhook
tools.description: Send a test payload to verify a webhook. Pro/Ultra.

tools.name: madeonsol_stream_token
tools.description: Get a 24h WebSocket streaming token. Pro/Ultra.

tools.name: madeonsol_wallet_tracker_watchlist
tools.description: List your tracked wallets and remaining capacity.

tools.name: madeonsol_wallet_tracker_add
tools.description: Add a wallet to your watchlist.

tools.name: madeonsol_wallet_tracker_remove
tools.description: Remove a wallet from your watchlist.

tools.name: madeonsol_wallet_tracker_trades
tools.description: Historical swap/transfer events for watched wallets.

tools.name: madeonsol_wallet_tracker_summary
tools.description: Per-wallet stats: swap counts, SOL bought/sold.

tools.name: madeonsol_alpha_leaderboard
tools.description: Top profitable early-buyer wallets — 47,000+ scored. BASIC=25, PRO=100, ULTRA=500.

tools.name: madeonsol_alpha_wallet
tools.description: Full alpha profile + bot signals for one wallet. ULTRA only.

tools.name: madeonsol_alpha_linked
tools.description: Behaviorally linked wallets (co-bought 3+ tokens within 2s). ULTRA only.

tools.name: madeonsol_token_cap_table
tools.description: First non-deployer early buyers for a token, enriched. PRO=10, ULTRA=20.

tools.name: madeonsol_token_buyer_quality
tools.description: 0–100 buyer quality score for a token's first-buyer cohort.

tools.name: madeonsol_copytrade_list
tools.description: List your copy-trade rules. PRO/ULTRA.

tools.name: madeonsol_copytrade_create
tools.description: Create a copy-trade rule with webhook + WS delivery. PRO/ULTRA.

tools.name: madeonsol_copytrade_get
tools.description: Get one copy-trade rule. PRO/ULTRA.

tools.name: madeonsol_copytrade_update
tools.description: Update a copy-trade rule. PRO/ULTRA.

tools.name: madeonsol_copytrade_delete
tools.description: Delete a copy-trade rule. PRO/ULTRA.

tools.name: madeonsol_copytrade_signals
tools.description: Recent fired copy-trade signals (up to 7 days). PRO/ULTRA.
